name: team-blocks
description: Reusable, production-refined building blocks for Claude Code apps — a design standard, AI model + key settings, a data importer, and a team activity monitor. Refined once, reused everywhere.

plugins.name: building-blocks
plugins.description: A brand-agnostic design standard (tokens + ~34 base components), an AI model + API-key settings control, a CSV/Excel data importer, and a team activity monitor — as Claude skills (component code + wiring contract).
